title: Beyond Helper
description: A helper mod for the Blocks From Beyond modpack.
body:
A companion/helper mod for the Blocks From Beyond modpack.

The mod currently fetches some mods with 3rd party distribution enabled from curseforge that are essential to the pack as well as fetching the remaining mods from modrinth due to libraries and dependencies being scattered all around the place.

More features will be moved from the curseforge version of this mod to the modrinth release.

The mod does specific things and I doubt you'd have use for all the features but go ahead if you feel like this can help you.
